label: 615_net marketable_cash balance_marketable_privatelyheld
label_human: US Treasury privately-held net marketable borrowing
description: The U.S. Treasury regularly estimates privately-held net marketable borrowing for upcoming quarters, providing detailed forecasts of expected debt issuance to manage government finances and funding needs.
